patches.hypothesis: Refined the patch to handle general cases and avoid hardcoded values, while maintaining test-passing behavior and edge case handling. The root cause of the overfitting was identified as the hardcoded values in the patch. The refined patch uses a more general approach to handle different types of annotations and includes proper edge case handling.
The bug is caused by a missing null check in the _add() method, which results in a NullPointerException when the method is called with a null argument.
